_comment: Tier-2: Kratos requires element names with explicit node count (e.g. SmallDisplacementElement2D4N, not SmallDisplacement2D). The pitfall (kratos.linear_elasticity #0 from the existing catalog): 'Element names MUST include node count'. Verified operationally: CreateNewElement('SmallDisplacement2D', ...) raises RuntimeError 'Element ... is not registered'.
